title: elleanthus ruizii
intro: Elleanthus ruizii, also known as the Elleanthus or Ruiz's Elleanthus, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Balsaminaceae. The plant is traditionally used in medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Elleanthus ruizii include its ability to aid in reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Traditionally, Elleanthus ruizii is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal compounds and utilization of its health benefits.
